metadata.title: About — Gazetta
metadata.description: Learn about Gazetta, the stateless CMS built on composable fragments.

content.heading: About Gazetta
content.body: Gazetta is a stateless CMS that structures websites as composable components. No database, no build step — just templates, fragments, and pages composed at serve time.

content.quote: Gazetta lets us update shared components once and every page reflects it instantly. No more rebuilding the entire site.
content.author: Site Developer
